title: Skyline R34 at the Mini-Mart Coloring Page

funFacts: The Skyline R34 at the Mini-Mart featured the advanced ATTESA E-TS all-wheel-drive system and active rear steering, making it a high-tech track racer.
The Skyline R34 at the Mini-Mart is highly famous in pop culture and car movies, commonly referred to by car fans as 'Godzilla'.
